title: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: More than ten homes destroyed as fire devastates Vakansieplaas
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS: Mossel Bay Advertiser is on...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS: Mossel Bay Advertiser is on the scene at Vakansieplaas where the aftermath of last night’s fire is astounding.

Freelance photographer Robert Crous is walking through Vakansieplaas and has counted more than 10 homes that have burned down thus far.

“There’s emotional scenes and people are devastated,” Crous says.

There are also burned-out vehicles.

Vakansieplaas. Photo: Robert Crous

This is all that is left of a home in the area. Photo: Robert Crous

The area near the homes at Vakansieplaas. Photo: Robert Crous

A burnt out vehicle at a home in Vakansieplaas. Photo: Robert Crous

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
